# LandHaven - Professional Land Consulting & Surveying in Kenya

> LandHaven (a division of Jermaine Technologies Entreprises) provides premium, fully verified land plots, subdivision mapping, highest and best use (HBU) studies, and zoning consultancy in Kenya.

## Core Services
- **Land Surveys & Beaconing**: Precise boundary mapping by licensed land surveyors.
- **Zoning & User Modifications**: Changing zoning definitions (agricultural to commercial/residential), variance authorizations under PLUPA 2019.
- **Subdivision & Amalgamation**: Splitting and consolidating title deeds.
- **Environmental Assessments**: NEMA licensing and ESIA studies.
- **Master Planning**: Site layout configurations for satellite estates and logistics hubs.

## Key Sitemap Sections
- [Homepage](https://landhaven.co.ke/): Explains JTE surveying solutions, land purchase guarantees, and contact points.
- [Lands Directory](https://landhaven.co.ke/lands): Lists verified, cleanly-titled land properties for sale in Ruiru, Narok, etc.
- [Knowledge Hub (Blogs)](https://landhaven.co.ke/blogs): Master guides on zoning rules, subdivision, riparian regulations, and land-use.

## Blog Articles Detail Index
- [Navigating Land Entitlement](https://landhaven.co.ke/blogs/land-entitlement-process): Guide on zoning approvals, NEMA licensing, and physical planning acts in Kenya.
- [Highest and Best Use Studies](https://landhaven.co.ke/blogs/highest-and-best-use-study): Framework on legal, physical, and financial HBU tests to optimize land values.
- [Land Subdivision Process](https://landhaven.co.ke/blogs/land-subdivision-process): Step-by-step physical planning scheme flows, survey details, LCB consents, and costs.
- [Riparian Zones Setbacks](https://landhaven.co.ke/blogs/riparian-zones-nema-compliance): Environmental regulations, WRA pegging markers, and avoiding structural demolition.
- [Master Planning Large Acreage](https://landhaven.co.ke/blogs/master-planning-large-scale): Phasing, zoning, and infrastructure guidelines for mixed-use satellite cities.
- [Nairobi & Kiambu Zoning Variances](https://landhaven.co.ke/blogs/zoning-restrictions-variances): Zonal guidelines, plot ratios, ground coverage percentages, and user extensions.
